title: MGU Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Veterinarian Posts
description: The Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Veterinarian Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed any degree can apply for the MGU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application fee, salary, and how to ap...
